item.title: Apple 50 周年，苹果 CEO Tim Cook 给所有用户写了封信
item.guid: Apple-50-周年，苹果-CEO-Tim-Cook-给所有用户写了封信
item.description:
On April 1st this year, Apple will officially celebrate its 50th birthday. On the occasion of this extraordinary milestone, Apple CEO Tim Cook wrote an open letter to global users, thanking those who dare to pursue different ideas and truly change the world. 今年 4 月 1 日，Apple 将正式迎来 50 周岁生日。在这个意义非凡的里程碑之际，苹果 CEO Tim Cook 给全球用户写了一封公开信，感谢那些敢于追求不同想法、并真正改变世界的人。

In the letter, Apple laid several "core Easter eggs," which are not only a microcosm of half a century of technological evolution but also a return to its original intention: 信中，Apple 埋下了几个「核心彩蛋」，它们不仅是半个世纪科技进化的缩影，更是对初心的回溯：

    Reshaping a classic slogan: The letter's title "50 Years of Thinking Different" directly reuses Apple's classic advertising slogan "Think Different" (Think Differently) from 1997, which changed business history. Changing "Think" to "Thinking" emphasizes the continuous practice over the past half-century;

    Return of the retro rainbow Logo: The colorful stripes at the top of the official visual are a variant of Apple's early rainbow Logo used from 1976 to 1998. Re-enabling it for the 50th anniversary is a full embrace of nostalgia;

    Back to that "garage": The opening line of the letter, "Fifty years ago, in an unassuming garage," directly echoes the legendary origin of Apple founded by Steve Jobs and Steve Wozniak. The subsequent list (Apple Computer ➡️ Mac ➡️ iPod ➡️ iPhone ➡️ iPad/Watch/AirPods) is a complete product evolution timeline;

    Homage to "the crazy ones": The end of the letter fully quotes the most classic narration from the 1997 "Think Different" advertisement: "Here’s to the crazy ones… The ones who see things differently." This is not only a declaration of Apple's brand spirit but also a reaffirmation of the philosophy Jobs most advocated during his lifetime.

Tim Cook wrote in the letter: "What truly inspires us has never been what technology itself can do, but what you can achieve with technology." The most exciting chapters of every innovation are, in fact, personally written by each user. Tim Cook 在信中写道：「真正激励我们的，从来不是科技本身能做什么，而是你能用科技实现什么。」每一项创新的最精彩篇章，其实正由每一位用户亲自撰写。

item.title: 曝原阿里 Qwen 后训练负责人郁博文加盟字节 Seed
item.guid: 曝原阿里-Qwen-后训练负责人郁博文加盟字节-Seed
item.description:
According to IT Times, Yu Bowen, the former head of post-training for Alibaba's Tongyi Lab's Qwen (Qianwen) large model, joined ByteDance's Seed team this month as the head of post-training for the visual model and multimodal interaction team. The report states that he and Lin Junyang, the former technical head of the Tongyi Qianwen large model, resigned on the same day. 据 IT 时代网报道，原阿里通义实验室 Qwen（千问）大模型后训练负责人郁博文，已于本月加入字节跳动 Seed 团队，出任视觉模型与多模态交互团队后训练负责人。报道称，他与通义千问大模型前技术负责人林俊旸同日离职。

Dr. Yu Bowen graduated from the Institute of Information Engineering, Chinese Academy of Sciences, specializing in natural language processing and information extraction research for a long time. He has published multiple papers at international conferences such as ACL and EMNLP and has won the President's Award of the Chinese Academy of Sciences. 郁博文博士毕业于中国科学院信息工程研究所，长期专注自然语言处理与信息抽取研究，在 ACL、EMNLP 等国际会议发表多篇论文，并曾获中国科学院院长奖。

In 2022, he joined Damo Academy as an "Ali Star," deeply participating in the early R&D of Tongyi Qianwen, and subsequently grew to become the head of Qwen post-training, leading the alignment and fine-tuning of the Qwen Chat series models. 2022 年，他以「阿里星」身份加入达摩院，深度参与通义千问早期研发，随后成长为 Qwen 后训练负责人，主导 Qwen Chat 系列模型的对齐与精调工作。

Internally at Alibaba, the Qwen team initiated an organizational restructuring in March this year. After Lin Junyang announced his resignation in the early morning of March 4, several core members left successively, including Yu Bowen, Qwen3.5/VL/Coder contributor Kaixin Li, and others. 在阿里内部，Qwen 团队于今年 3 月启动组织架构调整，林俊旸于 3 月 4 日凌晨宣布卸任后，多名核心成员相继离职，包括郁博文、Qwen3.5/VL/Coder 贡献者 Kaixin Li 等。

item.title: 王腾公布今日宜休品牌名「ISHO」：核心成员来自小米、华为等科技公司
item.guid: 王腾公布今日宜休品牌名「ISHO」：核心成员来自小米、华为等科技公司
item.description:
Yesterday, Wang Teng, founder of Jinri Yixiu Technology Company, updated the company's latest developments on Weibo, officially announcing the brand name "ISHO" and outlining its strategic plan for the next 5 to 10 years. 昨天，今日宜休科技公司创始人王腾在微博更新了公司的最新动态，正式公布品牌名「ISHO」，并阐述其未来 5 至 10 年的战略规划。

Wang Teng stated that the newly announced brand name "ISHO" is pronounced "Yixiu" and means "Inner Strength High Output," aiming to emphasize "accumulating energy and releasing high efficiency." Currently, ISHO has initiated trademark registration processes in over 20 countries and regions worldwide. 王腾表示，此次公布的品牌名「ISHO」发音为「宜休」，含义为「Inner Strength High Output」，意在强调「积蓄精力、释放高效」。目前，ISHO 已在全球 20 多个国家和地区启动商标注册流程。

Wang Teng further explained that ISHO's goal is not to launch a single product, but to build a complete sleep ecosystem based on AI technology, sleep science research, and product closed-loop, creating a full-link solution from monitoring to improvement over the next 5 to 10 years, allowing users to "rest assured and boldly enjoy their rest." 王腾进一步解释称，ISHO 的目标并非推出单一产品，而是计划依托 AI 技术、睡眠科学研究与产品闭环构建完整的睡眠生态系统、在未来 5 至 10 年打造从监测到改善的全链路方案，让用户能够「安心、大胆地享受休息」。

Currently, the Jinri Yixiu team has initially taken shape, with core members from tech companies such as Xiaomi and Huawei. Wang Teng revealed that the ISHO App's internal beta is being prepared, and users will be invited to participate in testing later, with real user needs continuously collected as the basis for product definition. 目前，今日宜休团队已初步成型，核心成员来自小米、华为等科技公司。王腾透露，ISHO App 内测正在筹备中，后续将邀请用户参与测试，并持续收集真实需求作为产品定义依据。

item.title: 蔚来李斌：成立时就预期盈利需 10 年，首次单季转正「只是回归常识」
item.guid: 蔚来李斌：成立时就预期盈利需-10-年，首次单季转正「只是回归常识」
item.description:
According to Tencent News, after Nio announced its first quarterly profit in 11 years since its establishment, founder and CEO William Li stated at a media briefing in Shanghai that Nio had expected it would take at least 10 years to achieve profitability from its inception, which is a basic rule of the automotive industry. 据腾讯新闻报道，在蔚来公布成立 11 年来的首次单季盈利后，创始人兼 CEO 李斌在上海举行的媒体沟通会上表示，蔚来从成立之初就预期盈利至少需要 10 年时间，这是汽车行业的基本规律。

He emphasized that profitability is not a "surprise moment" but the normal state of business operations. 他强调，盈利并非「惊喜时刻」，而是企业经营应有的常态。

Li Bin said that the "sense of shame" from external perceptions of losses is not important; the key is to spend money wisely, avoid fatal mistakes, and keep the company "alive." 李斌称，外界对亏损的「耻感」并不重要，关键在于把钱花在刀刃上、避免致命错误，让公司「活下去」。

He pointed out that Nio has shifted from "burning money for scale" to "precise calculation for profit," and the internal CBU mechanism's cost reduction and efficiency improvement have become part of the company's culture. He cited an example where an R&D project that typically costs 30 million yuan in the industry was completed by Nio for 2 million yuan with better results. 他指出，蔚来从过去的「烧钱换规模」转向「精算求盈利」，内部 CBU 机制带来的降本增效已成为公司文化的一部分。他举例称，行业普遍需要 3000 万元的研发项目，蔚来最终以 200 万元完成且效果更好。

The financial report shows that in the fourth quarter of last year, Nio's overall average selling price per vehicle increased quarter-on-quarter to 253,000 yuan. Driven by the strong sales of the ES8, single-quarter vehicle sales revenue grew by 60% to 31.6 billion yuan, and the gross profit margin rose to 18.1%. 财报显示，去年第四季度蔚来整体单车售价环比提升至 25.3 万元，受 ES8 热销带动，单季卖车收入增长六成至 316 亿元，毛利率升至 18.1%。

Under the combined effect of reduced expenses and increased gross profit, the company recorded a Non-GAAP net profit of 720 million yuan, marking its first positive turn in history. 在费用下降与毛利提升的共同作用下，公司 Non-GAAP 净利润录得 7.2 亿元，为历史首次转正。

item.title: 于东来公布胖东来 40 亿元分配细则：不要再猜想了
item.guid: 于东来公布胖东来-40-亿元分配细则：不要再猜想了
item.description:
Pang Donglai founder Yu Donglai recently responded consecutively on social media to external discussions about the company's "4 billion yuan asset distribution plan," emphasizing that the relevant information is true and urging outsiders "not to speculate further." 胖东来创始人于东来近日连续在社交平台回应外界对公司「40 亿元资产分配方案」的讨论，强调相关信息均属实，并呼吁外界「不要再猜想了」。

Yu Donglai stated that over the past 26 years, Pang Donglai has consistently adhered to an operational model based on systems and shareholding. Early shares were mostly arranged through gratuitous gifts or nominee holdings, with distribution following principles of fairness and standards set according to job value. 于东来表示，过去 26 年间，胖东来始终坚持依靠制度和股份制的运营模式，早期股份多以无偿赠予或代持方式安排，分配遵循公平原则，按岗位价值制定标准。

He emphasized that the core of the distribution system lies in stimulating employee potential, making employees realize that their income comes from their own abilities, not from external charity. 他强调，分配制度的核心在于激发员工潜能，让员工意识到收入来源于自身能力，而非外界施舍。

The asset distribution plan announced on March 8 shows that Pang Donglai will distribute approximately 4 billion yuan in assets, with 50% allocated to the management team and 50% to employees, to serve as future company capital. Annual profits will continue to be distributed as "50% team bonuses, 50% shareholder returns." 3 月 8 日公布的资产分配方案显示，胖东来将约 40 亿元资产按管理团队与员工各 50% 的比例分配，并作为未来公司股本，每年利润继续按「50% 团队奖金、50% 股东收益」的方式执行。

According to the disclosed details, the group has a total of 10,194 employees and total assets of approximately 3.793 billion yuan. Among these, 12 store managers each received 20 million yuan, totaling 240 million yuan; two highest-level personnel in the technical team each received 10 million yuan; and ordinary employees received approximately 200,000 yuan per person. 根据披露的明细，集团共有员工 10194 人，总资产约 37.93 亿元，其中 12 名店长每人分配 2000 万元，总计 2.4 亿元；技术团队两名最高级别人员人均可获 1000 万元；普通员工人均约 20 万元。

Yu Donglai further pointed out in his response that a company's distribution system not only concerns employee happiness but also the long-term happiness of entrepreneurs and investors. Only when all three parties benefit can the company develop healthily. He emphasized that increasing the income of the management team and employees is the most scientific and effective way for ordinary enterprises. 于东来在回应中进一步指出，企业分配制度不仅关乎员工幸福，也关系到企业家与投资者的长期幸福，只有三方共同受益，企业才能健康发展。他强调，提高管理团队与员工收入，是普通企业最科学有效的方式。

Pang Donglai also explicitly stated that it will maintain its positioning as a "school-like enterprise" and will never go public , and will cease scale expansion after completing sample city planning. The highest management must retire from positions of power before the age of 60 to maintain organizational youthfulness and vitality. In February this year, Yu Donglai announced his official retirement after the Spring Festival. 胖东来还明确 将保持「学校式企业」定位，永不上市 ，并在完成样本城市规划后停止规模扩张；最高管理层需在 60 岁前退出权力岗位，以保持组织年轻化与活力。今年 2 月，于东来已宣布春节后正式退休。

item.title: 理想公布 2025 年财报：连续三年盈利，研发投入创历史新高
item.guid: 理想公布-2025-年财报：连续三年盈利，研发投入创历史新高
item.description:
Li Auto yesterday released its financial report for the fourth quarter and full year of 2025: 理想汽车昨天公布了 2025 年第四季度及全年财报：

    In 2025, Li Auto achieved revenue of 112.3 billion yuan and a net profit of 1.1 billion yuan, with revenue exceeding 100 billion for three consecutive years and maintaining profitability; cash reserves reached 101.2 billion yuan, the highest level in the industry;

    Full-year R&D investment reached a record high of 11.3 billion yuan, averaging nearly 1 billion yuan per month, with AI-related investment accounting for 50%;

    Cumulative R&D investment over the past three years reached 33 billion yuan, and the full-stack self-developed embodied intelligence technology foundation for software and hardware has fully taken shape; Q4 R&D investment was 3 billion yuan, with chips, compilers, operating systems, and foundational models advancing collaboratively.

    In terms of quarterly performance: 109,000 vehicles were delivered in Q4 2025, a QoQ increase of 17.1%, with the proportion of pure electric models continuing to rise; quarterly revenue was 28.8 billion yuan, a QoQ increase of 5.2%.

As of the end of 2025, Li Auto has established a systemic foundation with 11.3 billion yuan in R&D investment, 101.2 billion yuan in cash reserves, over 4,000 self-built supercharging stations, and 539 direct-operated stores. 截至 2025 年末，理想汽车已构建起 113 亿元研发投入、1012 亿元现金储备、超 4000 座自建超充站与 539 家直营门店的体系基础。

item.title: 受 AI 冲击，Adobe CEO 将卸任
item.guid: 受-AI-冲击，Adobe-CEO-将卸任
item.description:
According to Bloomberg, Adobe has confirmed that CEO Shantanu Narayen, who has led the company for nearly 18 years, will step down after the company selects a successor, but will continue to serve as chairman. 据彭博社报道，Adobe 已确认执掌公司近 18 年的 CEO Shantanu Narayen 将在公司选定继任者后卸任，但会继续担任董事长职务。

Adobe stated that the successor selection process has begun, with independent board director Frank Calderoni overseeing the process. In his statement, he said the company would seek a suitable leader to guide Adobe into its next phase of growth and thanked Narayen for continuing as CEO during the transition to ensure a smooth handover. Adobe 表示，继任者遴选工作已启动，董事会独立董事 Frank Calderoni 将负责监督流程。他在声明中称，公司将寻找能够带领 Adobe 进入下一阶段增长的合适领导者，并感谢 Narayen 在过渡期继续担任 CEO 以确保平稳交接。

Since the beginning of this year, affected by the impact of generative AI and investor concerns about the software industry's prospects, Adobe's stock price has cumulatively fallen by approximately 23%, reaching a three-year low. 今年以来，受生成式 AI 冲击及投资者对软件行业前景的担忧影响，Adobe 股价累计下跌约 23%，创近三年低位。

In terms of financial performance, Adobe's latest quarterly data shows revenue grew by approximately 12% year-over-year to $6.4 billion, exceeding market expectations; annualized revenue from AI-first products more than tripled year-over-year. The company expects next quarter's revenue to be in the range of $6.43 billion to $6.48 billion, slightly above market consensus. 在财务表现方面，Adobe 公布的最新季度数据显示，营收同比增长约 12% 至 64 亿美元，超出市场预期；AI-first 产品的年化收入同比增长超过三倍。公司预计下一季度营收将达到 64.3 亿至 64.8 亿美元区间，略高于市场一致预期。

However, Adobe Stock's business experienced a greater-than-expected decline this quarter. Management stated that the rapid popularization of generative AI is accelerating changes in user behavior, and the company will continue to offer more choices between traditional assets and AI-generated content. 不过，Adobe Stock 业务在本季度出现超预期下滑，管理层称生成式 AI 的快速普及正在加速用户行为变化，公司将继续在传统素材与 AI 生成内容之间提供更多选择。

item.title: OPPO 手机也吃上龙虾，陈希晒小布 Claw 实机演示
item.guid: OPPO-手机也吃上龙虾，陈希晒小布-Claw-实机演示
item.description:
Yesterday, Chen Xi, Design Director of ColorOS, demonstrated multiple capabilities of Xiaobu Claw on Weibo, from local content retrieval to cross-device collaboration, presenting an intelligent interactive experience closer to an "open world" style. 昨天，ColorOS 设计总监陈希在微博展示了小布 Claw 的多项能力，从本地内容调取到跨端协同，呈现出更接近「开放世界」式的智能交互体验。

In the demonstration, Chen Xi sent a command to Xiaobu, asking it to read the audio file of the broadband installation communication with the operator and generate a core summary. 在演示中，陈希向小布发送指令，请其读取与运营商沟通宽带报装的录音文件，并生成核心摘要。

Xiaobu then retrieved the 17-minute call content with China Telecom on February 17, extracted key information such as the installation address, converged broadband package price, suspension and retention fees, and reasons for incomplete processing (e.g., requiring original ID verification), and identified follow-up items. 小布随后调取了 2 月 17 日与中国电信的 17 分钟通话内容，提取出报装地址、融合宽带套餐价格、停机保号费用、未完成办理的原因（如需身份证原件核验）等关键信息，并识别出后续需跟进的事项。

Chen Xi also demonstrated Xiaobu Claw's cross-device coordination capabilities by directly sending commands from a tablet to Xiaobu on a phone, allowing it to view browsing history on Find N6's Xiaohongshu and generate a summary. After the task is completed, the results are synchronized back to the tablet, along with actionable follow-up suggestions. 陈希还演示了小布 Claw 的跨端协调能力，通过平板直接向手机端的小布发送指令，让其查看 Find N6 上的小红书浏览记录并生成摘要。任务完成后，结果同步回平板，并附带可执行的后续操作建议。

Chen Xi stated that in addition to conventional system control, Xiaobu Claw also offers more "interesting ways to play," an experience that is "as free and imaginative as playing an open-world game for the first time." 陈希表示，小布 Claw 除了常规系统控制外，还具备更多「更有意思的玩法」，这种体验「像第一次玩开放世界游戏一样，自由、充满想象力」。

However, he also emphasized that as a mature product for the general public, Xiaobu Claw still has many fundamental capabilities and security issues to address. The team hopes to "safely raise shrimp," providing the best user experience after perfecting the underlying capabilities. 不过他也强调，作为面向大众的成熟产品，小布 Claw 仍有大量基础能力与安全问题需要解决，团队希望「安全养虾」，在完善底层能力后再向用户提供最佳体验。

item.title: 追觅手机价格公布：6800 元起、黄金定制款超 10 万元
item.guid: 追觅手机价格公布：6800-元起、黄金定制款超-10-万元
item.description:
According to Sina Technology, yesterday, Dreame officially launched its first high-end flagship smartphone at AWE 2026, with an estimated starting price of $999 (approximately RMB 6,872). The ultra-luxury custom models are priced by gold weight, with a price range from 70,000-80,000 yuan to over 100,000 yuan. 据新浪科技报道，昨天，追觅在 AWE 2026 上正式发布首款高端旗舰手机，起步价预计为 999 美元（约合人民币 6872 元），而高奢定制款则按黄金克重计价，价格区间从 7、8 万元至超过 10 万元不等。

Dreame phones currently run Android 16, but the official statement revealed a potential shift to a self-developed operating system next year. Concurrently, Dreame is also expanding into light luxury categories such as smartwatches and smart headphones. 追觅手机目前搭载安卓 16，但官方透露可能在明年转向自研操作系统。与此同时，追觅还同步扩展智能手表、智能耳机等轻奢品类。

Furthermore, Dreame plans to launch the Aurora App, supporting online customization and offline design team follow-up, with a customization period of about one month. In the future, it will also add services such as private jet customization, space travel booking, digital asset management, and second-hand transactions, further strengthening its high-end ecosystem layout. 此外，追觅还计划推出 Aurora App，支持线上定制、线下设计团队跟进，定制周期约为一个月，未来还将加入私人飞机定制、太空旅行预定、数字资产管理及二手交易等服务，进一步强化高端生态布局。

The Dreame AURORA brand first disclosed the progress of its self-developed AI operating system, AURORA AI OS 1, at AWE 2026, and announced that it will invest over ten billion in R&D funds in the next three years across three core technologies: imaging, AI systems, and display. The team size will expand to 5,000 people by 2027, with R&D personnel accounting for no less than 70%. 追觅 AURORA 品牌在 AWE 2026 上首次披露其自研 AI 操作系统 AURORA AI OS 1 的进展，并宣布未来三年将在影像、AI 系统、显示三大核心技术投入超百亿研发资金，团队规模将在 2027 年扩张至 5000 人，其中研发人员占比不低于 70%。

item.title: OpenClaw 之父指责腾讯「白剽」，又对百度说「Amazing」
item.guid: OpenClaw-之父指责腾讯「白剽」，又对百度说「Amazing」
item.description:
Yesterday, Peter Steinberger, the father of OpenClaw, accused Tencent on X of scraping skill data from ClawHub and importing it into its own SkillHub, sparking an ongoing debate about "open-source spirit" and "the boundaries of big tech behavior." 昨天，OpenClaw 之父 Peter Steinberger 在 X 指责腾讯从 ClawHub 抓取技能数据并导入自家 SkillHub，引发关于「开源精神」与「大厂行为边界」的持续争论。

Initially, a netizen @Steinberger claimed that Tencent "scraped all skills from ClawHub" into its own SkillHub. Steinberger later replied that he had received emails complaining about rate limits affecting scraping speed, and criticized Tencent for "copying but not supporting the project." 起初，一位网友 @Steinberger 称，腾讯在自家的 SkillHub 中「抓取了 ClawHub 的全部 skill」。Steinberger 随后回复称，他曾收到邮件抱怨其速率限制影响抓取速度，并批评腾讯「复制却不支持项目」。

After the incident escalated, Tencent's official account "Tencent AI" responded, emphasizing that SkillHub is a localized skill platform built on the OpenClaw ecosystem, aiming to provide better usability and access speed for Chinese users, and stated that it "has always clearly marked ClawHub as the source." 事件发酵后，腾讯官方账号「Tencent AI」发文回应，强调 SkillHub 是基于 OpenClaw 生态构建的本地化技能平台，旨在为中国用户提供更好的可用性与访问速度，并表示「一直明确标注 ClawHub 为来源」。

Tencent also released specific data: SkillHub provided users with 180GB of traffic (approximately 870,000 downloads) in its first week online, while only 1GB was pulled from the official source. Furthermore, members of the team have contributed code and PRs to OpenClaw, hoping to become "better contributors." 腾讯还公布了具体数据：SkillHub 上线首周为用户提供了 180GB 流量（约 87 万次下载），而从官方源仅拉取了 1GB，且团队中有成员为 OpenClaw 贡献代码与 PR，希望成为「更好的贡献者」。

However, Steinberger was not entirely convinced by Tencent's explanation. In his subsequent reply, he stated that the issue was not with the mirroring itself, but with Tencent's lack of prior communication: "We could have synchronized, made things official, synchronized download statistics. The polite thing to do would have been to ask first." 不过，Steinberger 对腾讯的解释并不完全买账。他在后续回复中表示，问题不在于镜像本身，而在于腾讯未事先沟通：「我们本可以同步、让事情变得正式、同步下载统计。礼貌的做法是先问一声」。

He also mentioned that Tencent's scraping behavior had caused his server costs to approach five figures, and hoped that Tencent could provide practical support at the resource level. 他还提到，腾讯的抓取行为曾导致其服务器成本逼近五位数，希望腾讯能在资源层面提供实际支持。

Interestingly, on the same day, Steinberger's attitude towards Baidu was noticeably more positive. 有意思的是，就在同一天，Steinberger 对百度的态度明显更为积极。

Baidu set up an OpenClaw "Lobster Market" at an offline event, attracting nearly 1,000 visitors, and announced that the Baidu App now supports direct access to OpenClaw, covering approximately 700 million MAU. Concurrently, Baidu AI Cloud has also taken the lead in supporting OpenClaw deployment. 百度在线下活动中搭建 OpenClaw「Lobster Market」，吸引近 1000 名访客，并宣布百度 App 已支持直接访问 OpenClaw，覆盖约 7 亿 MAU，同时百度智能云也率先支持 OpenClaw 部署。

Steinberger responded "Amazing" in the comments section and stated that the project welcomes maintainers or sponsors. Steinberger 在评论区回应「Amazing」（太好了），并表示项目欢迎维护者或赞助商。

item.title: Perplexity 推出「Personal Computer」：让 Mac mini 成为云端 AI 的本地执行器
item.guid: Perplexity-推出「Personal-Computer」：让-Mac-mini-成为云端-AI-的本地执行器
item.description:
Yesterday, Perplexity announced the launch of a new feature called "Personal Computer," which deeply integrates a local Mac mini with cloud AI, forming a continuously online, remotely controllable "personal computer" form factor. 昨天，Perplexity 宣布推出全新功能「Personal Computer」，将本地 Mac mini 与云端 AI 深度整合，形成一种持续在线、可远程控制的「个人电脑」形态。

Perplexity stated that "Personal Computer" is centered around a Mac mini running 24 hours a day. By merging the local environment with Perplexity's cloud computing, AI can execute tasks across files, applications, and sessions, and users can remotely control this local computer from any device. Perplexity 表示，「Personal Computer」以一台 24 小时运行的 Mac mini 为核心，通过本地环境与 Perplexity 云端计算的合并，使 AI 能够跨文件、应用与会话执行任务，用户可在任意设备上远程控制这台本地电脑。

item.title: 本田迎来上市以来首次年度亏损
item.guid: 本田迎来上市以来首次年度亏损
item.description:
According to Bloomberg, Honda Motor Co. yesterday unexpectedly lowered its earnings forecast for fiscal year 2025 (April 2025 – March 2026) and disclosed electrification strategy-related costs and losses totaling up to 2.5 trillion yen, marking the company's first annual loss since its listing. 据彭博社报道，本田汽车昨天突然下调 2025 财年（2025.4–2026.3）业绩预期，并披露最高达 2.5 万亿日元的电动化战略相关费用与损失，创下公司上市以来首次年度亏损。

Honda announced that it would cancel some electric vehicle R&D and launch projects originally planned for the North American market, and re-evaluate its overall electrification strategy. 本田表示，将取消部分原计划在北美市场推出的电动汽车研发与上市项目，并重新评估整体电气化战略。

Affected by this, the company expects an operating loss of between 270 billion and 570 billion yen for the current fiscal year, with a net loss potentially reaching 420 billion to 690 billion yen, far below previous profit expectations. 受此影响，公司预计本财年经营亏损在 2700 亿至 5700 亿日元之间，净亏损则可能达到 4200 亿至 6900 亿日元，远低于此前的盈利预期。

Bloomberg quoted Honda CEO Toshihiro Mibe as saying that the suspension of EV subsidies in North America, coupled with intensified market competition, has made it impossible for the company to maintain product attractiveness and competitive advantage, leading to an imminent strategic adjustment. In addition, Honda's declining competitiveness in Asia, especially in the Chinese market, will also bring asset impairment risks. 彭博社援引本田 CEO 三部敏宏的表述称，北美地区电动汽车补贴的暂停叠加市场竞争加剧，使公司无法维持产品吸引力与竞争优势，导致战略调整迫在眉睫。此外，本田在亚洲尤其是中国市场的竞争力下滑，也将带来资产减值风险。

Regarding its main business, Honda's automobile division recorded an operating loss of 166.4 billion yen in the first nine months of the current fiscal year, while its motorcycle business continued to grow. 在主营业务方面，本田汽车部门在本财年前九个月已录得 1664 亿日元经营亏损，而摩托车业务仍保持增长。

The company stated that it will strengthen its hybrid vehicle lineup, optimize its product portfolio, and increase investment in the Indian market to seek growth opportunities. Honda plans to announce its new business strategy in May this year. 公司表示，将强化混合动力车型布局、优化产品线，并加大对印度市场的投入，以寻求增长空间。本田计划于今年 5 月公布新的业务战略。

item.title: Meta 官宣自研 AI 芯片：四代 MTIA 将于两年内全面部署
item.guid: Meta-官宣自研-AI-芯片：四代-MTIA-将于两年内全面部署
item.description:
Yesterday, Meta released a press release on its official website, announcing its self-developed AI chip roadmap and plans to deploy four MTIA (Meta Training and Inference Accelerator) chips within the next two years, covering various workloads from ranking and recommendation (R&R) to generative AI (GenAI) training and inference. Meta 昨天在官网发布新闻稿，官宣其自研 AI 芯片路线图，并计划在未来两年内部署四款 MTIA（Meta 训练与推理加速器）芯片，覆盖从排名与推荐（R&R）到生成式 AI（GenAI）训练与推理的多类工作负载。

    MTIA 300 is already in production, primarily used for R&R training;

    MTIA 400 supports GenAI while maintaining compatibility with R&R, with performance reaching a level competitive with mainstream commercial products;

    MTIA 450 has been deeply optimized for GenAI inference, doubling High Bandwidth Memory (HBM) bandwidth and introducing low-precision data types to improve inference efficiency;

    MTIA 500 further enhances HBM bandwidth, capacity, and low-precision computing power, with mass production expected in 2027.

Yee Jiun Song, Meta's VP of Engineering, stated that chip development must keep pace with the evolution of AI models, so the company adopts a high-frequency iteration strategy, launching a new generation of chips approximately every six months. Meta 工程副总裁 Yee Jiun Song 表示，芯片开发必须紧跟 AI 模型演进速度，因此公司采取高频迭代策略，每约六个月推出一代新芯片。

Meta emphasized that the MTIA series chips are not for the general market but are customized for Meta's internal specific workloads to reduce costs and improve energy efficiency. Its software stack is entirely based on PyTorch, vLLM, and Triton, supporting graph mode compilation, automatic tuning, and large-scale deployment monitoring, aiming to enable seamless migration of internal models between GPUs and MTIAs. Meta 强调，MTIA 系列芯片并非面向通用市场，而是为 Meta 内部的特定工作负载定制，以降低成本并提升能效。其软件栈完全基于 PyTorch、vLLM 与 Triton，支持图模式编译、自动调优与大规模部署监控，旨在让内部模型在 GPU 与 MTIA 之间无缝迁移。

item.title: 腾讯 WorkBuddy 发布重大升级：支持微信一键直连
item.guid: 腾讯-WorkBuddy-发布重大升级：支持微信一键直连
item.description:
Yesterday, Tencent Cloud's AI-native desktop intelligent agent workbench WorkBuddy (Tencent's "Xiaolongxia") released a new version and made it fully available, focusing on upgrading four core capabilities: WeChat one-click direct connection, stable long links for WeChat Work, automated task execution and monitoring, and Skills import. 昨天，腾讯云旗下 AI 原生桌面智能体工作台 WorkBuddy（腾讯版「小龙虾」）发布全新版本并全量开放，重点升级微信一键直连、企业微信稳定长链接、自动化任务执行与监控追踪，以及 Skills 导入等四项核心能力。

    WeChat one-click direct connection: Users only need to configure a WeChat customer service account in the settings to remotely trigger WorkBuddy on the computer via WeChat voice or text to perform tasks, including searching for information, writing copy, processing reports, etc. All operations are completed locally to ensure privacy and security;

    WeChat Work connection supports automatic reconnection after network disconnection, and a new automated scheduled task function has been added, allowing users to set rules such as "fetch industry hot topics at 9 AM every day" or "organize meeting minutes every Friday." Upon completion, tasks can be automatically pushed to WeChat Work in formats like Markdown, PDF, etc.;

    Over 20 skill packs are built-in, compatible with the OpenClaw system, and support multi-instance parallel execution. The new version adds a Skills management function, allowing users to import skills with one click, quickly reference them in conversations, and flexibly enable or disable them, facilitating the migration and unified management of existing skills;

Tencent Cloud also announced a full-link security system for WorkBuddy, including system-level isolation through cloud-based Lighthouse, enterprise iOA, and PC Manager sandbox, as well as the introduction of security AI Skills such as vulnerability scanning and local data desensitization plugins, to enhance overall protection capabilities. 腾讯云还公布了面向 WorkBuddy 的全链路安全体系，包括通过云端 Lighthouse、企业 iOA 与电脑管家沙箱实现系统级隔离，以及推出漏洞扫描、本地数据脱敏插件等安全 AI Skills，以提升整体防护能力。

Tencent Cloud announced that from now until March 31, domestic users who register will receive a 5000 Credits experience subsidy, which can be directly used to execute complex tasks. 腾讯云宣布，即日起至 3 月 31 日，国内版用户注册即可获赠 5000 Credits 体验补贴，可直接用于执行复杂任务。

item.title: 科沃斯全场景服务机器人亮相 AWE 2026
item.guid: 科沃斯全场景服务机器人亮相-AWE-2026
item.description:
Yesterday, the China Home Appliance and Consumer Electronics Expo (AWE 2026) opened at the Shanghai New International Expo Center. Ecovacs unveiled its full range of household service robot matrix for the first time, announcing its full entry into the "embodied intelligence era" and releasing a new brand philosophy, "Creation Made Easy." 昨天，中国家电及消费电子博览会（AWE 2026）在上海新国际博览中心开幕。科沃斯首次展出全品类家用服务机器人矩阵，宣布全面迈入「具身智能时代」，并发布全新品牌理念「创造无难事」。

    The first butler robot "Bajie" equipped with OpenClaw officially debuted, attempting to fill the gap in the field of three-dimensional storage for service robots. Based on the Xiaolongxia OpenClaw intelligent agent technology framework, "Bajie" can autonomously identify and store scattered items, and complete spatial partitioning and item placement according to family members' living habits;

    The first AI bionic companion robot "Maotuan'er" is modeled after a Maltese dog, integrating multi-modal perception and pet-like behavior technology, with five built-in personality traits and emotional expression capabilities, pushing the product towards emotional companionship;

    Regarding conventional cleaning product lines, Ecovacs showcased the Deebot X12, T90 PRO, mini2, and the world's first all-in-one base station window cleaning robot Winbot W3, extending application scenarios to outdoor GOAT series robotic lawnmowers and pool robots.

To support the productization of embodied AI, Ecovacs is expanding its underlying technology stack. In addition to independently developing core components and AI algorithms, it has also invested in cutting-edge technology companies such as "Wuding" and Qingtou AI. Official data reveals that its pioneering rolling brush live water floor washing technology has achieved sales of over 1.6 million units globally. 为支撑具身智能的产品落地，科沃斯正在拓宽底层技术栈，除了自主研发核心零部件与 AI 算法外，还投资了「五鼎」与擎徒 AI 等前沿技术企业。官方披露的数据显示，其首创的滚筒活水洗地技术已在全球实现超 160 万台的销量。

At the exhibition, multiple market certifications issued by Aoweiyun.com (AVC) and IDC show that Ecovacs has ranked first in China's sweeping robot market for 11 consecutive years and has maintained the top global market share for window cleaning robots for 3 consecutive years. 展会现场，奥维云网（AVC）与 IDC 颁发的多项市场认证显示，科沃斯已连续 11 年位居中国扫地机器人规模第一，并连续 3 年保持擦窗机器人全球市场份额首位。

item.title: 爱诗科技宣布完成 C 轮融资
item.guid: 爱诗科技宣布完成-C-轮融资
item.description:
Yesterday, AI video generation company Aisi Technology announced the completion of its Series C financing round, led by CDH Hong Kong Fund, CDH VGC, and CDH Baifu, with participation from industrial investors China Ruyi, 37 Interactive Entertainment, and multiple institutions including E-Town Capital, Zhongwei Capital, Guotai Junan Innovation Investment, Su Venture Capital Group, Suzhou Zhuopu, Hwacom Capital, Fosun RZ Capital, and Suzhou Yihe. 昨天，AI 视频生成企业爱诗科技宣布完成 C 轮融资，由鼎晖香港基金、鼎晖 VGC、鼎晖百孚领投，产业投资人中国儒意、三七互娱，以及包括亦庄国投、众为资本、国泰君安创新投资、苏创投集团、苏州卓璞、华控基金、复星锐正、苏州宜和在内的多家机构参与投资。

Overseas investors include UOB Venture Management, Lion X Fund under the OCBC ecosystem, 3W Fund, Antler, EnvisionX Capital, iGlobe Partners, and others. 海外投资方则包括 UOB Venture Management、OCBC 生态下 Lion X 基金、3W Fund、Antler、EnvisionX Capital、iGlobe Partners 等。

This round of financing will primarily be used for the continuous iteration of video foundation models, cutting-edge research and development of real-time world models, productization of next-generation interactive entertainment, and global talent team building. 本轮融资将主要用于视频基础模型的持续迭代、实时世界模型的前沿研发、下一代互动娱乐产品化，以及全球化人才团队建设。

The company believes that the value of AI video is shifting from one-time content generation to the construction of sustainable interactive digital worlds. Future product forms will integrate content consumption, interactive experiences, and social participation, forming new digital entertainment platforms. 公司认为，AI 视频的价值正从一次性内容生成转向可持续互动的数字世界构建，未来产品形态将融合内容消费、互动体验与社交参与，形成新型数字娱乐平台。

item.title: 💡 Neuralink 联合创始人：第一批能活到 1000 岁的人或已出生
item.guid: 💡-Neuralink-联合创始人：第一批能活到-1000-岁的人或已出生
item.description:
According to The Paper, Neuralink co-founder Max Hodak recently made a radical prediction in multiple public interviews and podcasts, stating that "the first people who can live to 1000 years old might have already been born." 据澎湃新闻报道，Neuralink 联合创始人马克斯·霍达克（Max Hodak）近日在多场公开访谈与播客中提出激进预测，称「第一批能活到 1000 岁的人，现在可能已经出生了」。

Hodak believes that 2035 will become the "event horizon" of technological development, where synergistic breakthroughs in artificial intelligence and brain-computer interfaces (BCI) will reshape the human condition thereafter. 霍达克认为，2035 年将成为技术发展的「事件视界」，人工智能与脑机接口（BCI）的协同突破，将在此后重塑人类生命状态。

He pointed out that the brain is essentially a sophisticated computer encased in the skull, and the latent space structure of current AI models is highly similar to how the human brain processes information, implying that neuroscience is approaching the brain's underlying "API." 他指出，大脑本质上是一台被头骨包裹的精密计算机，而当前 AI 模型的潜空间结构与人类大脑处理信息的方式高度相似，这意味着神经科学正逼近大脑的底层「API」。

In the interview, Hodak further outlined technological pathways for the next 5 to 10 years, including: 霍达克在访谈中进一步描绘了未来 5 至 10 年的技术路径，包括：

    Bio-hybrid interfaces: "growing" neural interfaces in the brain using stem cell technology to replace metal electrodes, achieving higher bandwidth human-machine integration;

    Digital drugs: precisely regulating brain regions using non-invasive methods such as ultrasound, forming "digital sleeping pills" and "digital stimulants" that can replace chemical drugs;

    Life extension technologies: from miniature life support systems like wearable artificial lungs to the more controversial concept of consciousness backup, pushing medicine from "rescue mode" to "end-of-life care."

item.title: 卢伟冰预热 Xiaomi Book Pro：轻薄续航便携「不可能三角」
item.guid: 卢伟冰预热-Xiaomi-Book-Pro：轻薄续航便携「不可能三角」
item.description:
Yesterday, Lu Weibing, Partner and President of Xiaomi Group, continuously posted multiple updates on Weibo, previewing the upcoming thin and light flagship laptop Xiaomi Book Pro 14. Its core highlights focus on three aspects: lightweight design, Pro-level performance release, and flagship-grade materials. 昨天，小米集团合伙人、总裁卢伟冰在微博连续发布多条动态，预热即将发布的轻薄旗舰笔记本 Xiaomi Book Pro 14。其核心亮点集中在三方面：轻量化、Pro 级性能释放与旗舰级用料。

    The entire machine features an integrated die-cast magnesium alloy body, a 3D hot-pressed high-strength carbon fiber bottom shell, and an upgraded titanium alloy internal keyboard support plate, with the overall weight controlled at 1.08 kg;

    Equipped with Intel's latest Core Ultra X7 358H processor, built on the Intel 18A process, its integrated 12Xe iGPU delivers approximately 70% higher graphics performance under low power consumption;

    Internally equipped with a 10000 mm² ultra-large VC cooling module, high-speed silent fans, and a three-channel stereo cooling architecture, the entire machine can achieve 50W performance release.

In terms of appearance, three color options have been officially announced: "Elegant Grey," "White," and "Soft Mist Blue." All three colors feature a matte finish, targeting the high-end thin and light laptop market. 外观方面，官方公布了三款配色，包括「雅灰」、「白色」以及「柔雾蓝」。三款配色均采用雾面处理，定位高端轻薄本市场。

Lu Weibing stated that the goal of Xiaomi Book Pro 14 is to break the industry's inherent perception of "thin and light laptops having weak performance," achieving a balance of thinness and performance through systematic upgrades in materials, structure, and heat dissipation, which can be called the "impossible triangle." 卢伟冰表示，Xiaomi Book Pro 14 的目标是打破「轻薄本性能弱」的行业固有认知，通过材料、结构与散热的系统性升级，实现轻薄与性能的兼得，堪称「不可能三角」。

item.title: 第三代英特尔酷睿 Ultra 发布，AI PC 性能续航全面跃升
item.guid: 第三代英特尔酷睿-Ultra-发布，AI-PC-性能续航全面跃升
item.description:
Yesterday, Intel released the third generation Intel® Core™ Ultra processor family. Built on Intel 18A process technology, the new products have been comprehensively upgraded in terms of performance, energy efficiency, AI computing power, and battery life. 昨天，英特尔发布第三代英特尔® 酷睿™ Ultra 处理器家族。基于 Intel 18A 工艺打造，新品在性能、能效、AI 算力与续航方面全面升级。

According to reports, the Intel 18A process achieves a generational leap in transistor density, performance, and energy efficiency through RibbonFET all-around gate transistors and PowerVia backside power delivery technology, providing space for OEMs to integrate powerful performance and top-tier AI computing power into thin and light devices. 据介绍，Intel 18A 制程通过 RibbonFET 全环绕栅极晶体管与 PowerVia 背部供电技术，实现晶体管密度、性能与能效的跨代跃升，为 OEM 在轻薄机身中融入强劲性能与顶级 AI 算力提供了空间。

The third-generation Core Ultra family covers three product positioning categories: 第三代酷睿 Ultra 家族覆盖三类产品定位：

    Core Ultra X Series (All-round Flagship) features breakthrough graphics performance, performance per watt, and doubled AI computing power, capable of smoothly running 3A games. The 32GB VRAM model can locally deploy OpenClaw and call the Qwen3.5-35B-A3B model, achieving a low-cost, high-privacy local AI experience;

    8-core Thin and Light Long-Endurance Products feature a body weighing under 1 kg and multi-day battery life, suitable for mobile office and learning scenarios, with a maximum battery life of up to 27 hours;

    16-core Performance Powerhouse Products balance both thin and light performance laptops and thin and light gaming laptops, targeting heavy productivity scenarios for professional users, such as content creation and complex task processing.

item.title: 百度智能云发布全球首款手机龙虾应用「红手指 Operator」
item.guid: 百度智能云发布全球首款手机龙虾应用「红手指-Operator」
item.description:
Yesterday, Baidu AI Cloud launched the world's first mobile "Lobster" application – Red Finger Operator, featuring an out-of-the-box mobile AI Agent experience. 昨天，百度智能云上线全球首款手机「龙虾」应用——红手指 Operator，主打即开即用的移动端 AI Agent 体验。

According to reports, users simply need to download "Red Finger Operator" from the app store and register to "get a new shrimp" on their phone, commanding it to complete tasks via chat. Operator supports cross-app, multi-threaded operations, capable of executing complex processes such as hailing a taxi, ordering takeout, and interacting with social software. 据介绍，用户只需在应用商店下载「红手指 Operator」并注册，即可在手机中「喜提新虾」，通过聊天方式指挥其完成任务。Operator 支持跨 App、多线程操作，可执行打车、外卖订餐、社交软件交互等复杂流程。

item.title: 大疆首款 8K 全景无人机 Avata 360 定档 3 月 26 日
item.guid: 大疆首款-8K-全景无人机-Avata-360-定档-3-月-26-日
item.description:
Last night, DJI officially announced its first 8K flagship panoramic drone, DJI Avata 360, scheduled for global release on March 26th at 20:00. It is reported that the Avata 360 features 8K panoramic imaging capabilities and emphasizes its flagship positioning in flight experience and creative shooting. 昨晚，大疆正式官宣首款 8K 旗舰全景无人机 DJI Avata 360，并定档 3 月 26 日 20:00 全球发布。据悉，Avata 360 主打 8K 全景影像能力，并强调在飞行体验与创意拍摄上的旗舰定位。

In the previous warm-up phase, DJI had released multiple posters on social media platforms, with "Soar through the sky, survey the whole domain" as the core message, combined with lens details, sparking external speculation about its panoramic imaging capabilities. 在此前的预热阶段，大疆已在社交平台释出多张海报，以「畅游天际，纵览全域」为核心信息，结合镜头细节引发外界对其全景影像能力的推测。

With the latest official announcement, the Avata 360's appearance was fully revealed for the first time, featuring an integrated propeller guard design and continuing the mature body form of the Avata series. The official statement indicates that the new drone will further break through in controllability and playability, bringing users a more creative panoramic flight shooting experience. 随着最新官宣发布，Avata 360 外观首次完整亮相，采用一体化桨保设计，并延续 Avata 系列成熟机身形态。官方表示，新机将在操控性与可玩性上进一步突破，为用户带来更具创意的全景飞行拍摄体验。

item.title: 首发价 13999 元，安克发布 E1 UV 打印机
item.guid: 首发价-13999-元，安克发布-E1-UV-打印机
item.description:
Yesterday, eufyMake, Anker Innovations' personal creative tool brand, officially launched the world's first consumer-grade 3D texture UV printer E1 at AWE 2026. The host's initial price is 13999 yuan, and the price after national subsidy is 12599.1 yuan. 昨天，安克创新旗下个人创意工具品牌 eufyMake 在 2026 AWE 上正式发布全球首款消费级立体纹理 UV 打印机 E1，主机首发价 13999 元，国补后价格 12599.1 元。

UV printing technology has been maturely applied in the industrial field for over 20 years, but traditional equipment is bulky, expensive, and relies on professional operators. Makers and small entrepreneurs often need to rely on contract manufacturers to complete customized creations. E1 aims to compress industrial-grade capabilities into a desktop form, lowering the barrier to creative production. UV 打印技术在工业领域已成熟应用超过 20 年，但传统设备体积庞大、售价高昂且依赖专业人员操作，创客与小型创业者往往需要依赖代工厂完成定制化创作。E1 旨在将工业级能力压缩至桌面级形态，降低创意生产门槛。

    Supports full-color and 3D texture printing on over 300 types of material surfaces, with a maximum resolution of 1440 DPI, and can be compatible with complex curved surfaces such as planes, cylinders, and cones via accessories;

    Adopts an innovative gantry architecture and 1250-ton automotive-grade high-pressure die-casting process, achieving 30-micron level precision control while reducing the volume by 90% compared to industrial-grade equipment;

    Anker's self-developed Amass3D™ 3D texture printing technology and ColorMaestro™ multi-material color reproduction system are responsible for texture formation and color calibration, respectively, ensuring precise color reproduction with a million-level color gamut on over 300 types of material surfaces;

    Equipped with the JetClean™ automatic printhead maintenance system, addressing the long-standing industry problem of printhead clogging;

    The Make It Real AI design tool supports multi-modal input such as sketches, photos, and text, capable of generating industrial-standard printing solutions with one click, and combined with intelligent positioning and laser ranging, achieves nearly fully automated operation.

Regarding pricing, the E1 host, including the ink cleaning cartridge set, has an initial price of 13999 yuan; the laminator accessory costs 2299 yuan; the rotary printing accessory costs 2199 yuan; and the long roll accessory can extend the single print area to 10 meters. 价格方面，E1 主机含墨水清洗盒套装，首发价 13999 元；覆膜机配件售价 2299 元；旋转打印配件售价 2199 元；长卷轴配件可将单次打印幅面延伸至 10 米。

Individual ink bottles are priced at 219 yuan each for cyan, magenta, yellow, and black, and 199 yuan for white and transparent. The initial launch price for the ink cleaning box set is 1499 yuan. 墨水单瓶定价为青、洋红、黄、黑各 219 元，白色与透明为 199 元，墨水清洗盒套装首发价 1499 元。

item.title: 腾讯推出「养虾户」专用表情包
item.guid: 腾讯推出「养虾户」专用表情包
item.description:
Following the release of its "shrimp farming" product matrix, Tencent has launched a new "shrimp farmer exclusive emoji pack." 腾讯继发布「养虾」产品矩阵之后，再推出一款全新的「养虾户专用表情包」。

Tencent stated that the emoji pack's inspiration comes from the group's shrimp farming culture and the "xia" (shrimp) homophone pun, hoping to add atmosphere to user discussions about lobster usage and help explore more AI application scenarios. 腾讯表示，表情包灵感源自群内的养虾文化及「虾」的谐音梗，希望为用户交流龙虾用法增添氛围，助力探索更多 AI 应用落地场景。

item.title: 微信上线三项新功能：支持忽略来电、语音同传与视频锁屏
item.guid: 微信上线三项新功能：支持忽略来电、语音同传与视频锁屏
item.description:
Yesterday, WeChat officially announced three new features focusing on call and cross-language communication scenarios, which are gradually being rolled out to more devices. 昨天，微信官宣推出三项围绕通话与跨语言沟通场景的新功能，正在逐步向更多设备放量。

    A new "Ignore" button has been added to the voice/video call interface. After a user clicks it, the call pop-up will immediately disappear, and the caller will not receive a "rejected" notification. The overall experience is closer to the natural state of "missed call." Previously, if users were unable to answer, they could only wait for the ringtone to end;

    WeChat's voice-to-text feature now includes "simultaneous interpretation." After sending a voice message, users can click the "Translate" button in the bottom left corner to automatically convert the voice content into text in the target language. WeChat Pay stated that this feature currently supports 18 languages, including Chinese, and is continuously expanding;

    A screen lock feature has been added to the video call interface. During a video call, users can click the lock icon in the top right corner to hide buttons such as hang up, preventing accidental touches from interrupting the call.

item.title: 两轮电动车也吃上「龙虾」？九号官宣接入 OpenClaw
item.guid: 两轮电动车也吃上「龙虾」？九号官宣接入-OpenClaw
item.description:
Yesterday, Ninebot, a two-wheel electric vehicle brand, announced that its smart electric vehicles have integrated into the OpenClaw ecosystem, becoming the industry's first brand to "eat lobster" (a pun on "dragon shrimp" or "longxia," referring to OpenClaw). According to reports, after integrating with OpenClaw, Ninebot vehicles can provide proactive services based on AI capabilities. 昨天，两轮电动车品牌九号宣布其智能电动车接入 OpenClaw 生态，成为行业首个吃上「龙虾」的品牌。据介绍，接入 OpenClaw 后，九号车辆能够基于 AI 能力实现主动式服务。

    The system can proactively remind users to charge when the battery level falls below a certain threshold, or push safety alerts if the vehicle has not moved for an extended period;

    AI can combine real-time traffic and user schedules to calculate and recommend the optimal route, for example, suggesting cycling instead of taking a taxi to avoid congestion based on remaining time and meeting arrangements;

    Users can also set up daily vehicle status briefings via voice commands to obtain comprehensive data including location, battery level, and health status. In family guardian mode, the system can monitor children's routes to and from school, and immediately send alerts to guardians if the vehicle deviates from a safe range or stops abnormally.

Currently, the launched skills only offer read-only permissions, covering data such as on/off status, charging status, battery level, location, mileage, and range. They do not support vehicle control operations like remote unlocking or speed adjustment, thereby reducing potential risks by design. 目前，上线的技能仅开放只读权限，涵盖开关机状态、充电情况、电量、定位、里程与续航等数据，并不支持远程解锁、调速等控车操作，从设计上降低潜在风险。

Ninebot also advised that beta users need to complete the OpenClaw environment deployment themselves and should refer to the security recommendations published by the National Internet Emergency Center when cautiously installing relevant intelligent agent applications. 九号方面也提示，内测用户需自行完成 OpenClaw 环境部署，且应参考国家互联网应急中心发布的安全建议，谨慎安装相关智能体应用。

The ninebot-device-skill is now live on the ClawHub platform, officially commencing internal testing. The registration portal for internal testing will open today in the "Circles" section of the Ninebot Travel App. Ninebot stated that more capabilities will be gradually opened in the future to further enrich the application of AI in riding scenarios. ninebot-device-skill 现已上线 ClawHub 平台，正式开启内测。内测报名入口今天将在九号出行 App「圈子」板块开放。九号表示，未来将逐步开放更多能力，以进一步丰富 AI 在骑行场景中的应用。

item.title: 《长夜将尽》定档 3 月 21 日
item.guid: 《长夜将尽》定档-3-月-21-日
item.description:
The film "The Long Night Will End" has officially announced its release date for March 21st on national art house circuits, simultaneously releasing a date announcement trailer and a new poster. 电影《长夜将尽》官宣定档 3 月 21 日登陆全国艺联专线，并同步发布定档预告与全新海报。

Directed by Wang Tong and produced by Rao Xiaozhi, the film stars Wan Qian and Rao Xiaozhi, focusing on themes such as the dignity of life, family relationships, and death education. The story revolves around nanny Ye Xiaolin, who disguises herself to enter an elderly family with the intent to commit a crime. 影片由王通执导，饶晓志监制，万茜与饶晓志领衔主演，聚焦生命尊严、家庭关系与死亡教育等议题，故事围绕保姆叶晓霖伪装进入老人家庭图谋行凶展开。

As she unexpectedly encounters zookeeper Ma Deyong, her original plans and life balance are disrupted; meanwhile, police officer Zhou Ping's fate gradually intertwines with theirs during his investigation of the case. 随着她与饲养员马德勇的意外相遇，原本的计划与生活平衡被打破；警察周平在追查案件的过程中，与两人的命运逐渐交织。

item.title: 《穿普拉达的女王2》确认引进
item.guid: 《穿普拉达的女王2》确认引进
item.description:
The film "The Devil Wears Prada 2" has been confirmed for release in mainland China, with its specific release date yet to be announced. It will premiere in North America on May 1st. 电影《穿普拉达的女王2》已确认引进中国内地，目前档期尚未公布，5 月 1 日在北美上映。

The prequel, "The Devil Wears Prada," was released in mainland China on February 27, 2007, grossing 15.4 million yuan and is considered a fashion enlightenment work for many viewers. 前作《穿普拉达的女王》于 2007 年 2 月 27 日在中国内地上映，累计票房 1540 万元，被视为不少观众的时尚启蒙作品。

The sequel sees the return of the original cast and crew, including Meryl Streep, Emily Blunt, Anne Hathaway, Stanley Tucci, and others, with David Frankel still directing. Additionally, actors such as Kenneth Branagh, Lucy Liu, Simone Ashley, and Justin Theroux have joined, and Lady Gaga will also make a cameo appearance. 续集由原班主创回归，包括梅丽尔·斯特里普、艾米丽·布朗特、安妮·海瑟薇、斯坦利·图齐等，导演仍为大卫·弗兰科尔。同时，肯尼斯·布拉纳、刘玉玲、西蒙娜·阿什利、贾斯汀·塞洛克斯等演员加入，Lady Gaga 亦将客串出演。

In terms of plot, the film will revolve around "the devil" Miranda. As the traditional publishing industry continues to decline, the fashion magazine "RUNWAY" falls into financial crisis, and Miranda has to seek help from her former assistant, Emily, who is now an executive at a luxury goods group. 剧情方面，影片将围绕「女魔头」米兰达展开。随着传统出版行业持续衰落，时尚杂志《RUNWAY》陷入财务危机，米兰达不得不向昔日助理、如今已成为奢侈品集团高管的艾米莉寻求帮助。

item.title: 里兹·阿迈德新剧《诱饵》发布预告，3 月 25 日上线流媒体
item.guid: 里兹·阿迈德新剧《诱饵》发布预告，3-月-25-日上线流媒体
item.description:
Riz Ahmed's new drama "Bait" has released its official trailer. The series is presented in a mockumentary style, focusing on four crucial days in an actor's career low point: protagonist Shah Latif gets an audition opportunity to try out for the next James Bond, thus embarking on a tense and dramatic experience. 里兹·阿迈德主演的新剧《诱饵》(Bait)发布正式预告。该剧以伪纪录片形式呈现，聚焦一名演员在事业低谷中迎来关键转机的四天：主角 Shah Latif 获得试镜机会，争取出演新一任詹姆斯·邦德，由此展开一段紧张且戏剧化的经历。

In addition to starring, Ahmed also serves as writer, showrunner, and executive producer. Actors such as Guz Khan, Sheeba Chaddha, and Sajid Hasan also participate in the show. According to the trailer, the series will be available on Amazon's streaming platform on March 25. 阿迈德除担任主演外，还兼任编剧、运作人及执行制作人。古兹·可汗、谢巴·查达、Sajid Hasan 等演员亦参与出演。根据预告信息，该剧将于 3 月 25 日在 Amazon 流媒体平台上线。
